introSection:
Apple Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK fairground operator Mellors Group.

The entrance sign for the ride reads "Apple Coaster" however the coaster itself has a "Family Roller Coaster" sign.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster has been operating at the Mellors Group-owned Fantasy Island since the 2021 season.

fullText:
Apple Coaster is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by UK fairground operator Mellors Group.

The entrance sign for the ride reads "Apple Coaster" however the coaster itself has a "Family Roller Coaster" sign.

The coaster has been operating at the Mellors Group-owned Fantasy Island since the 2021 season.
